mapper.sql: id, order_id, member_id, product_id, total_amount, down_payment_amount, paid_amount, unpaid_amount, installment_count, current_period, status, activated_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_order_installment_plan (order_id, member_id, product_id, total_amount, down_payment_amount, paid_amount, unpaid_amount, installment_count, current_period, status, activated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{memberId}, #{productId}, #{totalAmount}, #{downPaymentAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{unpaidAmount}, #{installmentCount}, #{currentPeriod}, #{status}, #{activatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE order_id = order_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pt_order_installment_plan WHERE order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM pt_order_installment_plan WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_order_installment_plan SET paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, unpaid_amount = #{unpaidAmount}, current_period = #{currentPeriod}, status = #{status}, activated_at = #{activatedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pt_order_installment_plan p SET p.status = 3, p.updated_at = NOW() WHERE p.status = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pt_order_installment_bill b WHERE b.plan_id = p.id AND b.status = 2 )
